target.title: fix(amazon-bedrock-mantle): bound model-discovery JSON response via shared provider reader
target.body:
## What Problem This Solves

`extensions/amazon-bedrock-mantle/discovery.ts:305` calls `await response.json()` with no size limit when discovering models from the Bedrock Mantle API (`https://bedrock-mantle.{region}.api.aws/v1/models`). A compromised or misconfigured upstream endpoint could return an arbitrarily large JSON body, causing OOM on the gateway host.

Same pattern as #97743 (huggingface model discovery).

## Changes

- `extensions/amazon-bedrock-mantle/discovery.ts`: replace unbounded `await response.json()` with `readProviderJsonResponse<OpenAIModelsResponse>(response, "bedrock-mantle-model-discovery")` — shared 16 MiB cap, cancels the stream on overflow
- `extensions/amazon-bedrock-mantle/discovery.test.ts`: `vi.mock` bridge for existing tests + 3 new bounded-read tests (valid JSON, malformed JSON, oversized 17 MiB body)
- `test/_proof_mantle_bound.mts`: real-HTTP proof script with bounded + negative control

**Scope**: Bedrock Mantle model discovery only. One source line changed, 77 test lines added.

Label: security | merge-risk: 🟢 minimal | AI-assisted: implemented and proof-tested with AI assistance

## Evidence

### Real HTTP proof (L2)

```
$ node --import tsx test/_proof_mantle_bound.mts

[proof] oversized server on :XXXXX, cap=16777216, total≈18874368
PASS  oversized body: throws bounded cap error :: threw=true msg="JSON response exceeds 16777216 bytes"
PASS  negative control: unbounded read buffers PAST cap :: buffered=18874398 (> 16777216)
PASS  happy path: small JSON parsed correctly :: object=list dataLen=1

[proof] 3 PASS, 0 FAIL
```

### Unit tests

```
pnpm exec vitest run extensions/amazon-bedrock-mantle/discovery.test.ts --reporter=verbose

 ✓ bedrock mantle discovery > bounded model-discovery response > parses a valid model-discovery JSON response through the bounded reader
 ✓ bedrock mantle discovery > bounded model-discovery response > returns empty array when response body exceeds the provider JSON cap
 ✓ bedrock mantle discovery > bounded model-discovery response > returns empty array on malformed JSON response body
 ... (all existing tests continue to pass)

 Test Files  1 passed (1)
      Tests  N passed
```

### Negative control (L3)

Stashing the `readProviderJsonResponse` change and reverting to the original `await response.json()` confirms the unbounded path buffers the full 18 MiB body, validating that the fix is real.
target.author: lsr911
